info.title: BeeEye Platform API
info.description: AI decision-intelligence platform for ADMC. Read-only analytics in the initial implementation. All bounded contexts are mounted under /api/v1.

get.summary: Rotation mix, decay alerts and dead-stock counts
Full demand insight (incl. regional breakdown) for one configuration
Back-test comparison, chosen model and future forecast with confidence intervals
Where forecasts consistently over- or under-perform, by product / region
Available filter dimension values and month range
Portfolio KPIs and risk / aging distributions
Server-side paged, filtered and sorted inventory grid
Full risk breakdown, factors and recommendation for one unit
Procurement quantity ranges and safety stock for a scenario
Fleet-level service-intensity KPIs with coverage and synthetic-data provenance
Mileage-band, time-since-sale and service-type breakdowns for one model
Portfolio KPIs: parts, predicted demand, low-data and at-risk counts, demand-class mix
Per-part demand, recommended stocking range, risk and low-data flag (paged, sortable, filterable)
Usage history, method comparison (Croston/SBA/TSB), forecast range, supersession & compatibility
Recommended order quantities by configuration for a scenario
Recorded recommendations, newest and highest-priority first

post.summary: Run the ruleset and persist any recommendation not already recorded

get.summary: Ranked cross-module decisions needing attention, with headline aggregates
